name: hpc-agent
notes: Copy this file to latest.json when publishing a real release.
Replace every REPLACE_WITH_* value with the sha256sum of the published file.
Use relative paths from the model root, for example 0.2.6/hpc_agent-0.2.6-py3-none-any.whl.
highlights: 0.2.6 adds external MCP tools injection so HPC Agent can act as an MCP Client.
Injected tools are filtered by allowed_tools and exposed as external_<server>_<tool>.
